chunks.title: The Lord's Anger and Destruction of Zion
chunks.reason: Describes God's wrath as the cause of Jerusalem's fall using military metaphors.

chunks.title: The Suffering of Elders and Infants
chunks.reason: Depicts the physical grief of city leaders and the starvation of children.

chunks.title: Lament over Jerusalem's Vast Destruction
chunks.reason: The speaker questions how to compare the city's ruin and notes God's completed purpose.

chunks.title: Call for Tears and Intercession
chunks.reason: Urges the city to weep continuously and asks God why He allowed such horror.

chunks.title: The Enemy Consumes the People
chunks.reason: Summarizes the total slaughter of all ages and the enemy's victory.
